framework.name: Arduino-ESP32
framework.notes: framework-arduinoespressif32 installed in ~/.platformio/packages; compatible with espressif32 platform and esp32dev board.

platform.name: espressif32
platform.notes: PlatformIO dev-platform installed; supports Arduino and ESP-IDF frameworks.

board.name: esp32dev
board.notes: Board definition supplied by espressif32 platform; equivalent to ESP32-2432S028R used on CYD2USB v3.

python_packages.name: platformio
python_packages.notes: Installed in workspace .venv; pio.exe located at .venv/Scripts/pio.exe.

python_packages.name: pyserial
python_packages.notes: Dependency of PlatformIO and esptoolpy; installed in .venv.

binaries.name: pio
binaries.notes: PlatformIO CLI executable; resolves platform, board, and library dependencies.

binaries.name: wokwi-cli
binaries.notes: WOKWI_CLI_TOKEN loaded from workspace .env; wokwi-cli --version returned successfully.

libraries.name: lvgl
libraries.notes: Registry package lvgl/lvgl; installed/cached and used by reference project CYD2USB_HelloLVGL.

libraries.name: TFT_eSPI
libraries.notes: Registry package bodmer/TFT_eSPI; installed/cached and used by reference project CYD2USB_HelloLVGL.

libraries.name: XPT2046_Touchscreen
libraries.notes: Registry package paulstoffregen/XPT2046_Touchscreen; installed/cached and used by reference project CYD2USB_HelloLVGL.

hardware.name: CYD2USB v3 (ESP32-2432S028R)
hardware.notes: No physical unit detected on this machine; only Bluetooth virtual COM ports found. Target environment includes Wokwi simulation.

hardware.name: ST7789 display
hardware.notes: Physical 240x320 panel not present; Wokwi uses wokwi-ili9341 as a generic 240x320 framebuffer.

hardware.name: XPT2046 touch controller
hardware.notes: Physical controller not present; Wokwi uses wokwi-xpt2046 simulation.

hardware.name: Backlight GPIO 21
hardware.notes: Physical backlight circuit not present; simulated in wokwi/diagram.json wiring.

simulators.name: Wokwi CLI
simulators.notes: Wokwi CLI installed and authenticated; will run the project using wokwi/diagram.json.

external_programs.name: tool-esptoolpy
external_programs.notes: PlatformIO upload/flash tool for ESP32; installed in ~/.platformio/packages.

external_programs.name: toolchain-xtensa-esp32
external_programs.notes: GCC Xtensa compiler for ESP32; installed in ~/.platformio/packages.
